title: Kyiv: 2027 killed
title_en: Kyiv: 2027 killed
title_uk: Київ: 2027 вбитих
description: UK sets 2027 deadline for full import ban on Russian diesel and jet fuel. The U.K. announced on June 12 that imports of diesel and jet fuel produced from Russian crude oil will be fully banned by Jan. 1, 2027, as part of broader efforts to cut off revenue streams funding Moscow's war against Ukraine.
description_en: UK sets 2027 deadline for full import ban on Russian diesel and jet fuel. The U.K. announced on June 12 that imports of diesel and jet fuel produced from Russian crude oil will be fully banned by Jan. 1, 2027, as part of broader efforts to cut off revenue streams funding Moscow's war against Ukraine.

The U.K. announced on June 12 that imports of diesel and jet fuel produced from Russian crude oil will be fully banned by Jan. 1, 2027, as part of broader efforts to cut off revenue streams funding Moscow's war against Ukraine.

description: 📝 The IMF disclosed the tariff change plan that Ukraine needs for a new tranche of $690 million Ukraine and the IMF reached an agreement on the next revision of the financing program. After its approval, Kyiv will be able to receive a new tranche in the amount of about $690 million. One of the conditions was the preparation of a roadmap for energy market reform. It provides for a gradual change in tariffs for the population after...

It provides for a gradual change in tariffs for the population after...

После его утверждения Киев сможет получить новый транш в размере около $690 млн. Одним из условий стала подготовка дорожной карты реформы энергорынка. Она предусматривает постепенное изменение тарифов для населения после...

title: 300 drones launched
title_en: 300 drones launched
title_uk: Запущено 300 дронів
description: About 300 UAVs have flown over the Russian Federation and the occupied territories, preparing fiery content for the morning, - monitors. As a reminder, in June, Ukraine is already hitting Russia with hundreds of drones almost every day. On the night of June 11, at least 330 UAVs flew - this was already the fifth attack in a month with an indicator of 300+.
description_en: About 300 UAVs have flown over the Russian Federation and the occupied territories, preparing fiery content for the morning, - monitors. As a reminder, in June, Ukraine is already hitting Russia with hundreds of drones almost every day. On the night of June 11, at least 330 UAVs flew - this was already the fifth attack in a month with an indicator of 300+.
description_uk: На рф и оккупированные территории полетели около 300 БПЛА готовить огненный контент к утру, - мониторы Напомним, в июне Украина уже почти ежедневно бьет по россии сотнями дронов. В ночь на 11 июня полетело не менее 330 БПЛА - это была уже пятая атака за месяц с показателем 300+.

description: Russia deployed five launch sites for "Shakhedov" on the border with Belarus, - "Radio Svaboda" Journalists found at least five such facilities in the Bryansk, Oryol and Smolensk regions of the Russian Federation. Most were built or expanded after the summer of 2024. From there, drones are launched over Kyiv and the western regions of Ukraine. They often fly along Belarus or enter its airspace, which complicates...
description_en: Russia deployed five launch sites for "Shakhedov" on the border with Belarus, - "Radio Svaboda" Journalists found at least five such facilities in the Bryansk, Oryol and Smolensk regions of the Russian Federation. Most were built or expanded after the summer of 2024. From there, drones are launched over Kyiv and the western regions of Ukraine. They often fly along Belarus or enter its airspace, which complicates...
description_uk: россия развернула пять пусковых площадок для "Шахедов" у границы с Беларусью, - "Радыё Свабода" Журналисты нашли минимум пять таких объектов в Брянской, Орловской и Смоленской областях рф. Большинство построили или расширили после лета 2024 года. Оттуда дроны запускают по Киеву и западным областям Украины. Они часто летят вдоль Беларуси или заходят в ее воздушное пространство, что усложняет...

description: Putin's war is already costing Russia 65 billion rubles a day Russian military spending in the first quarter of 2026 reached a record 5.9 trillion rubles, according to Janis Kluge, a researcher at the German Institute for International Security Problems, based on data from the Ministry of Finance. This is already 46% of the entire Russian budget. Simply put, almost every second ruble goes to the army and weapons production. On average, war...
description_en: Putin's war is already costing Russia 65 billion rubles a day Russian military spending in the first quarter of 2026 reached a record 5.9 trillion rubles, according to Janis Kluge, a researcher at the German Institute for International Security Problems, based on data from the Ministry of Finance. This is already 46% of the entire Russian budget. Simply put, almost every second ruble goes to the army and weapons production. On average, war...
description_uk: Путинская война обходится россиюшке уже в 65 млрд рублей в день Военные расходы рф в первом квартале 2026 года достигли рекордных 5,9 трлн рублей, подсчитал исследователь германского Института проблем международной безопасности Янис Клюге на основе данных Минфина. Это уже 46% всего российского бюджета. Проще говоря, почти каждый второй рубль уходит на армию и производство оружия. В среднем война...

title: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen...
title_en: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen...
title_uk: 🔹Ми відкриваємо ринок для набору іноземців для посилення...
description: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen combat units and save the lives of Ukrainian soldiers. Our goal is to fill up to 30–50% of the positions of stormtroopers and infantrymen with foreigners. 🔹One more key question. Justice for those who have been in the Defense Forces the longest and have spent the most time in combat. For them, by the end of the year, we will begin gradual dismissal from service. This is just the first stage...
description_en: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen combat units and save the lives of Ukrainian soldiers. Our goal is to fill up to 30–50% of the positions of stormtroopers and infantrymen with foreigners. 🔹One more key question. Justice for those who have been in the Defense Forces the longest and have spent the most time in combat. For them, by the end of the year, we will begin gradual dismissal from service. This is just the first stage...
description_uk: 🔹Відкриваємо ринок рекрутингу іноземців для підсилення бойових підрозділів та збереження життів українських військових. Наша мета — до 30–50% посад штурмовиків та піхотинців заповнити іноземцями. 🔹⁠Ще одне ключове питання. Справедливість для тих, хто найдовше в Силах оборони та провів найбільше часу на бойових. Для них до кінця року починаємо поступове звільнення зі служби. Це лише перший етап...

The power of unmanned systems is one of the greatest achievements of Ukraine, which proves Ukrainian leadership in technology and in saving lives thanks to technology. The number of Russian targets hit thanks to...

The power of unmanned systems is one of the greatest achievements of Ukraine, which proves Ukrainian leadership in technology and in saving lives thanks to technology. description_uk: Відзначив державними нагородами воїнів Сил безпілотних систем ЗСУ, передав орден «Золота Зірка» родині загиблого Героя, удостоєного цього звання посмертно, та вручив підрозділам бойові прапори. Сили безпілотних систем – одне з найбільших досягнень України – те, що доводить українське лідерство в технологіях і у збереженні життів завдяки технологіям. title: Today we present the first results of "Millennium". The feedback we...

description: Today we present the first results of "Millennium". The feedback we received during this time is to some extent historical. More than 2,600 applications for the competition. Hundreds of film, documentary, music, visual and performance art projects and more than 150 experts - well-known and authoritative people in the industry who will judge it. I thank each and every one of you - participants, experts, state team,...
description_en: Today we present the first results of "Millennium". The feedback we received during this time is to some extent historical. More than 2,600 applications for the competition. Hundreds of film, documentary, music, visual and performance art projects and more than 150 experts - well-known and authoritative people in the industry who will judge it. I thank each and every one of you - participants, experts, state team,...
description_uk: Сьогодні ми презентуємо перші підсумки «Тисячовесни». Фідбек, що ми отримали за цей час, певною мірою історичний. Понад 2600 заявок на конкурс. Сотні проєктів кіно, документалістики, музики, візуального й перформативного мистецтва та понад 150 експертів – відомих і авторитетних в індустрії людей, які будуть це оцінювати. Я дякую кожному й кожній із вас – учасникам, експертам, державній команді,...
